summary: The user is considering pursuing a Master's degree in Data Science and seeks information on universities with strong programs, particularly online options. They also reflect on the significance of their family's immigration anniversary from China. The session covers various universities, the online Master's program at Johns Hopkins University, average salaries for graduates, in-demand skills and job roles in data science, and the emerging trend of Explainability and Transparency in AI/ML.
facts: The user is considering pursuing a Master's degree in Data Science. The user's parents immigrated to the US from China on the same day as the chat session. The online Master of Science in Data Science program at Johns Hopkins University consists of 10 courses (30 credits) that can be completed in 2-3 years. The online MSDS program at Johns Hopkins University costs around $53,000-$60,000 total, depending on the number of credits transferred in. Average starting salaries for data science graduates from Stanford University range from $120,000 to $150,000. Average starting salaries for data science graduates from Carnegie Mellon University range from $100,000 to $130,000. Average starting salaries for data science graduates from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) range from $120,000 to $150,000. Average starting salaries for data science graduates from the University of California, Berkeley range from $90,000 to $120,000. Average starting salaries for data science graduates from Harvard University range from $110,000 to $140,000. Average starting salaries for data science graduates from Johns Hopkins University range from $80,000 to $110,000. The user is interested in learning more about the job market for data science graduates, including in-demand skills and job roles. The user is interested in exploring the emerging trend of Explainability and Transparency in AI/ML.
